summary: This is a very brief link post where Joel Spolsky points readers to a separate article he wrote about REALBasic. He notes that REAL Software is a particularly interesting case study because all three of his previously published strategy letters apply directly to the company. The post itself contains no substantive argument beyond this teaser.
key_points: Joel wrote a dedicated analysis of REALBasic as a company/product
He considers REAL Software a compelling example because all three of his strategy letters apply to it simultaneously
The post serves purely as a pointer to the full article rather than containing standalone analysis
money_quotes: REAL Software is a particularly interesting example because all three of my strategy letters apply to them very directly!
key_insight: REAL Software serves as a case study where multiple strategic frameworks about software business converge.
